author: fengzhe
description: Automatically resize the current Canvas text node to fit its content. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: fengzhe
manifest.description: Automatically resize the current Canvas text node to fit its rendered content.
manifest.name: Canvas Current Node Auto Size

name: Canvas Current Node Auto Size

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
## Sizing stability update

- Measure rendered Markdown width on every edit exit when tighten mode is enabled.
- Calculate width from natural Markdown content, real inner/outer frame insets, and a separate safety padding.
- Isolate rendered height measurement from the node's previous outer height.
- Retry first-time Markdown rendering and correct real scrollbar overflow after applying the measured size.
- Count active blank lines during editing while allowing rendered Markdown to determine the final height.
- Keep empty and one-line nodes above the configured minimum height.
- Change the default Exit tighten padding from 20 px to 5 px.
- Change the default Minimum line height from 44 px to 30 px.

Requires Obsidian 1.12.0 or newer.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
## Review compliance fix

- Move all off-screen measurement styles from static TypeScript assignments into scoped CSS classes.
- Use `setCssProps()` only for the dynamic measurement width.
- Include `styles.css` as an official release asset.
- Keep compatibility with Obsidian 1.12.0; the 1.13 settings API recommendation is intentionally deferred.

This release contains the same rendered-Markdown resize behavior introduced in 0.2.0.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description:
## What's new

- Resize the current Canvas text node from rendered Markdown for more accurate final width and height.
- Measure callouts, tables, lists, and code blocks at the final node width.
- Ignore trailing spaces and blank lines during sizing without changing the note text.
- Enable tighten-on-exit by default, with a 20 px default exit padding and a 60 px minimum width.
- Improve CJK-aware editing width, height fallbacks, settings descriptions, and resize diagnostics.

Requires Obsidian 1.12.0 or newer.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description: Remove unsupported setDestructive API for Obsidian 1.12 compatibility while preserving Setting.setHeading sections.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description: Restore Obsidian 1.12 compatibility while keeping review fixes: use Setting.setHeading sections, activeDocument/activeWindow, setDestructive, pinned @codemirror/view, and no builtin-modules dependency.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description: Fix Obsidian community review findings: migrate settings to getSettingDefinitions, use activeDocument/activeWindow, replace deprecated APIs, remove builtin-modules, and pin @codemirror/view.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description: Address Obsidian community review recommendations: remove clipboard access, add English README, and add release asset attestations.

releases.author: Laplacede
releases.description: Initial release of Canvas Current Node Auto Size.
